channel.title: New-Template on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in New-Template on smpaget blog

item.title: new template
item.description:
still working on it but looking good.
it is still Designed by andreas viklund, and blogger programmed into xml by other people. As was the previous blog template. Infact this is the new and improved version. I like the look of it. hopefully I won’t break it! whatdoyouthink?
